---
title: "Visium plotting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-18"
---

```{r,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_version("Seurat", version = "4.3.0")
remotes::install_version("SeuratObject", version = "4.1.4")

W5<- readRDS("w5.Rds")
DefaultAssay(W5) <- "SCT"
x <- c("LHX4","TFAP2B","OLIG1","SHOX2")

SpatialFeaturePlot(W5, features = c(x),ncol = 10,pt.size.factor = 30,image.alpha =5,stroke = 0.4,images = Images(W5)[c(9)])&theme(title = element_text(size = 15))&scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("white","azure1","azure2","darkorange2" , "red1","red4"))


```
